عربي
🇱🇧🇸🇾🇵🇸🇯🇴🇪🇬🇸🇦🇦🇪🇮🇶🇾🇪🇱🇾🇹🇳🇩🇿🇲🇦🇸🇩🇸🇴🇩🇯🇰🇼🇧🇭🇶🇦🇴🇲🇰🇲🇲🇷🇱🇧🇸🇾🇵🇸🇯🇴🇪🇬🇸🇦🇦🇪🇮🇶🇾🇪🇱🇾🇹🇳🇩🇿🇲🇦🇸🇩🇸🇴🇩🇯🇰🇼🇧🇭🇶🇦🇴🇲🇰🇲🇲🇷

Speak the Arabic
you've always understood.

Ana turns the content you already love into vocabulary that sticks — built for heritage speakers ready to go from understanding to fully expressing themselves.

No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.

تعلّم

Arabic isn't one language. Learn the version that's yours.

Choose from Modern Standard Arabic or the dialect your family speaks — Levantine, Egyptian, Gulf, or Darija. Every word you learn is tuned to how your people actually talk.

9:41▲ ◀ ◼

Your dialect

Which Arabic feels like home?

Modern Standard

🌍

Universal Arabic

الفصحى

Levantine

🇸🇾 🇱🇧 🇵🇸 🇯🇴

Syria · Lebanon · Palestine · Jordan

الشامية

Egyptian

🇪🇬

Egypt

المصرية

Gulf

🇸🇦 🇦🇪 🇰🇼 🇶🇦

Saudi Arabia · UAE · Kuwait · Qatar

الخليجية

Darija

🇲🇦 🇩🇿 🇹🇳

Morocco · Algeria · Tunisia

الدارجة
فهم

You understand more than you think.

Saying it is the hard part.

01

The feeling

You understand every word.

Your parents speak to you in Arabic. You get it all. You answer in English — and something is lost.

02

The plateau

Apps didn't cut it.

You tried Duolingo. Textbook phrases that never come up in real life. You plateaued, got bored, gave up.

03

The gap

What you need isn't in any curriculum.

It's in your family's stories, the shows they watch, the culture they carry.

تراث

Built for the in-between.

Heritage speakers who almost have it.

أفهم كل شيء

I understand everything

You grew up hearing Arabic at home. You get every word your parents say. But when you try to speak, something freezes.

أريد أن أتواصل

I want to connect

Your grandparents, your cousins back home — the conversations that matter most are in Arabic.

لغتي، تراثي

My language, my heritage

This isn't just about vocabulary. It's about owning a part of yourself that never quite felt fully yours.

ابدأ

ابدأ رحلتك

Be first to express yourself.

Ana is in early development. Join the waitlist and we'll reach out when we're ready to welcome our first users.

No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.

Learn to express yourself in the Arabic your family speaks.
